name: Performapal Uni
desc: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 or lower "Performapal" monster from your hand in Attack Position. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Performapal" monster, except "Performapal Uni", and this card from your GY; the next time you would take battle damage this turn, you do not.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 or lower "Performapal" monster from your hand in Attack Position. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Performapal" monster, except "Performapal Uni", and this card from your GY; the next time you would take battle damage this turn, you do not.

During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Performapal" monster, except "Performapal Uni", and this card from your GY; the next time you would take battle damage this turn, you do not.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Flash Version

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Activates during the turn in which it was Special Summoned
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
